title: verbascum × semisplendidum
intro: Verbascum × semisplendidum, also known as the Half-Hardy Mullein, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Mullein family and is often cultivated for its attractive flowers and medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular remedy for soothing sore throats, coughs, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Verbascum × semisplendidum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system, making it a valuable addition to herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Verbascum × semisplendidum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make cough syrups, salves, and ointments to treat various health conditions.
